description: PowerShell CDP WebSocket - فحص صفحة Maps مباشرة بدون Playwright
command_preview: $pages = (Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:9222/json' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $target = $null; foreach($p in $pages){ if($p.url -match 'maps.*contrib'){ $target = $p; break } }; if(-not $target){ Write-Output 'No maps page found. Navigating first page to add-a-place...'; $target = $pages[0]; $ws = New-Object System.Net.WebSockets.ClientWebSocket; $uri = [Uri]$target.webSocketDebuggerUrl; $ws.ConnectAsync($uri, [Threading.CancellationToken]::None).Wait(); $cmd = '{"id":1,"method":"Page.navigate","params":{"url":"https://business.google.com/create"}}'; $bytes = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($cmd); $seg = New-Object ArraySegment[byte] -ArgumentList (,$bytes); $ws.SendAsync($seg, 'Text', $true, [Threading.CancellationToken]::None).Wait(); Start-Slee
